title: rosa × subcanina
intro: Rosa × subcanina, also known as the wild dog rose, is a hybrid species of rose that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rosa × subcanina include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. Rosa × subcanina can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
